message.content:
@startuml
title US031 - As Team Member, I want to create a task in a user story

actor TeamMember
participant "CreateUSTaskUI" as CreateUSTaskUI
participant "CreateUSTaskController" as CreateUSTaskController
participant "Company" as Company
participant "taskTypeStore\n: TaskTypeStore" as taskTypeStore
participant "taskTypeList\n: List<TaskType>" as taskTypeList
participant "taskType\n: TaskType" as taskType
participant "taskTypeNames\n: List<String>" as taskTypeNames
participant "pStore\n: ProjectStore" as pStore
participant "proj : Project" as proj
participant "sList\n: SprintList" as sList
participant "sprint : Sprint" as sprint
participant "sprintBacklog" as sprintBacklog
participant "UserStoryList" as UserStoryList
participant "Us" as Us
participant "usTaskList\n: TaskList" as usTaskList
participant "taskList\n: List<Task>" as taskList
participant "task : Task" as task
participant "taskNames\n: List<String>" as taskNames
participant "projectTeam\n: ProjectTeam" as projectTeam
participant "projectTeam\n: List<Resource>" as projectTeamList
participant "resource : Resource" as resource
participant "currentResNames\n: List<String>" as currentResNames
participant "TaskMapper" as TaskMapper
participant "createTaskDTO\n: CreateTaskDTO" as createTaskDTO
participant "newIsTask : Task" as newIsTask

activate TeamMember
TeamMember -> CreateUSTaskUI : 1 Ask to create a task of a user story
activate CreateUSTaskUI

CreateUSTaskUI -> CreateUSTaskController : 2 getTaskTypes()
activate CreateUSTaskController

CreateUSTaskController -> Company : 3 getTaskTypeStore()
activate Company
Company --> CreateUSTaskController : 4 taskTypeStore
deactivate Company

CreateUSTaskController -> taskTypeStore : 5 getTaskTypeNames()
activate taskTypeStore

taskTypeStore -> taskTypeNames : 6 create()
activate taskTypeNames
note right : taskTypeNames\n: List<String>

loop [for each know task type]
taskTypeStore -> taskTypeList : 7 get(i)
activate taskTypeList
taskTypeList --> taskTypeStore : 8 taskType
deactivate taskTypeList
taskTypeStore -> taskType : 9 getName()
activate taskType
taskType --> taskTypeStore : 10 typeName
deactivate taskType
taskTypeStore -> taskTypeNames : 11 add(typeName)
activate taskTypeNames
deactivate taskTypeNames
taskTypeStore --> taskTypeStore : 12 true
end

taskTypeStore --> CreateUSTaskController : 13 taskTypeNames
deactivate taskTypeStore
deactivate taskTypeNames

CreateUSTaskController --> CreateUSTaskUI : 14 taskTypeNames
deactivate CreateUSTaskController

CreateUSTaskUI --> TeamMember : 15 Show a list of task types
TeamMember -> CreateUSTaskUI : 16 Selects task type

CreateUSTaskUI -> CreateUSTaskController : 17 getUSTask(projCode, sprintID, usID)
activate CreateUSTaskController

CreateUSTaskController -> Company : 18 getProjectStore()
activate Company
Company --> CreateUSTaskController : 19 pStore
deactivate Company

CreateUSTaskController -> pStore : 20 getProjectByCode(projCode)
activate pStore
pStore --> CreateUSTaskController : 21 proj
deactivate pStore

CreateUSTaskController -> proj : 22 getSprints()
activate proj
proj --> CreateUSTaskController : 23 sList
deactivate proj

CreateUSTaskController -> sList : 24 getSprintBySprintID()
activate sList
sList --> CreateUSTaskController : 25 sprint
deactivate sList

CreateUSTaskController -> sprint : 26 getBacklog
activate sprint
sprint --> CreateUSTaskController : 27 sprintBacklog
deactivate sprint

CreateUSTaskController -> sprintBacklog : 28 getUSList
activate sprintBacklog
sprintBacklog --> CreateUSTaskController : 29 usList
deactivate sprintBacklog

CreateUSTaskController -> UserStoryList : 30 getUs(usID)
activate UserStoryList
UserStoryList --> CreateUSTaskController : 31 us
deactivate UserStoryList

CreateUSTaskController -> Us : 32 getTaskList()
activate Us
Us --> CreateUSTaskController : 33 usTaskList
deactivate Us

CreateUSTaskController -> usTaskList : 34 getTaskNames()
activate usTaskList

usTaskList -> taskNames : 35 create()
activate taskNames
note right : taskNames\n: List<String>

loop [for each know task]
usTaskList -> taskList : 36 get(i)
activate taskList
taskList --> usTaskList : 37 task
deactivate taskList
usTaskList -> task : 38 getName()
activate task
task --> usTaskList : 39 taskName
deactivate task
usTaskList -> taskNames : 40 add(taskName)
activate taskNames
deactivate taskNames
usTaskList --> usTaskList : 41 true
end

usTaskList --> CreateUSTaskController : 42 taskNames
deactivate usTaskList
deactivate taskNames

CreateUSTaskController --> CreateUSTaskUI : 43 taskNames
deactivate CreateUSTaskController

CreateUSTaskUI --> TeamMember : 44 Show a list of current tasks\n(to choose a predecessor, if want)
TeamMember -> CreateUSTaskUI : 45 Selects precedence (optional)

CreateUSTaskUI -> CreateUSTaskController : 46 getCurrentProjectTeam()
activate CreateUSTaskController

CreateUSTaskController -> proj : 47 getProjectTeam()
activate proj
proj --> CreateUSTaskController : 48 projectTeam
deactivate proj

CreateUSTaskController -> projectTeam : 49 getCurrentResourceNames()
activate projectTeam

projectTeam -> currentResNames : 50 create()
activate currentResNames
note right : currentResNames\n: List<String>

loop [for each know resource]
projectTeam -> projectTeamList : 51 get(i)
activate projectTeamList
projectTeamList --> projectTeam : 52 resource
deactivate projectTeamList
projectTeam -> resource : 53 isCurrent()
activate resource
resource --> projectTeam : 54 result
deactivate resource

alt [result = true]
projectTeam -> resource : 55 getName()
activate resource
resource --> projectTeam : 56 resourceName
deactivate resource
projectTeam -> currentResNames : 57 add(resourceName)
activate currentResNames
deactivate currentResNames
end
projectTeam --> projectTeam : 58 true
end

projectTeam --> CreateUSTaskController : 59 currentResourceNames
deactivate projectTeam
deactivate currentResNames

CreateUSTaskController --> CreateUSTaskUI : 60 currentResourceNames
deactivate CreateUSTaskController

CreateUSTaskUI --> TeamMember : Shows resource list and request data
note left : 61 name, description, effortEstimate,\n   taskType, responsibles

TeamMember -> CreateUSTaskUI : 62 Choose and typed requested data

CreateUSTaskUI -> CreateUSTaskController : 63 createUSTask(createUSTaskDTO)
activate CreateUSTaskController

CreateUSTaskController -> TaskMapper : 64 createUSTask(createUSTaskDTO)
activate TaskMapper

TaskMapper -> usTaskList : 65 toModel(createUSTaskDTO)
activate usTaskList

usTaskList -> createTaskDTO : 66 name = getName()
activate createTaskDTO
deactivate createTaskDTO

usTaskList -> createTaskDTO : 67 description = getDescription()
activate createTaskDTO
deactivate createTaskDTO

usTaskList -> createTaskDTO : 68 effortEstimate = getEffortEstimate()
activate createTaskDTO
deactivate createTaskDTO

usTaskList -> createTaskDTO : 69 taskType = getTaskType()
activate createTaskDTO
deactivate createTaskDTO

usTaskList -> createTaskDTO : 70 responsible = getResponsible()
activate createTaskDTO
deactivate createTaskDTO

usTaskList -> newIsTask : 71 createTask(name, description,\n   effortEstimate, taskType, responsible)
activate newIsTask
note right : newIsTask : Task
deactivate newIsTask

usTaskList -> usTaskList : 72 newIsTask
usTaskList -> taskList : 73 saveTask(newIsTask)
activate taskList
deactivate taskList

usTaskList -> usTaskList : 74 validate(newIsTask)

usTaskList -> taskList : 75 add(newIsTask)
activate taskList
deactivate taskList

deactivate usTaskList
deactivate TaskMapper

CreateUSTaskController --> CreateUSTaskUI : 76 true
deactivate CreateUSTaskController

CreateUSTaskUI --> TeamMember : 77 created and saved successfully
deactivate CreateUSTaskUI

TeamMember --> TeamMember : 78 created and saved successfully
deactivate TeamMember

@enduml
